project.description: Target Angular project. Defaults to the workspace default project.

path.description: Path the file is written to. Defaults to `<project>/<sourceRoot>/app`.

set.description: Curated icon set. Combined with `icons` if both are passed.

icons.description: Comma-separated list of ngwr icon names (e.g. `plus,trash,checkmark`). Unknown names are flagged but not blocked.

exportName.description: Identifier exported as the icon array.
